description_long: This is a black metal fence section featuring vertical bars topped with pointed finials and a gently undulating top rail. The leftmost post is integrated with a classic street lamp, which has a square lantern and a pyramid-shaped cap. The fence has two horizontal rails, with the upper rail following a wavy pattern and the lower rail running straight. The vertical bars are evenly spaced, and each is capped with a small pointed finial, adding a decorative and secure appearance. The lamp post is thicker and more robust than the fence bars, providing both structural support and illumination. The overall design is both functional and ornamental, suitable for urban sidewalks, parks, or residential boundaries.
description: A black metal fence with pointed finials and a wavy top rail, attached to a lamp post with a pyramid-capped lantern. Decorative and functional, ideal for urban settings.
description_view_0: The fence section is seen at an angle, highlighting the lamp post and the wavy top rail with pointed finials.
description_view_1: A direct view of the lamp post from the front, showing its full height and the square lantern with a pyramid cap.
description_view_2: The opposite angle of the fence, emphasizing the undulating top rail and the attachment to the lamp post.
description_view_3: A straight-on view of the lamp post, focusing on the lantern and post details, with the fence mostly hidden.
attribute_top_design_pattern: alternating heights with wavy/undulating pattern and pointed finials
